_meta.description: Role-based access control matrix for GEM India. Defines which roles can access which modules and what actions they can perform.
sources: AGENTS.md — Roles (Clerk) table (HIGHEST PRIORITY for role definitions)
PM decision 2026-04-13 — Ops event context, Read-only create form behavior
_meta.amendment_reason: Role-matrix.json violated higher-priority oracle (AGENTS.md). Event Coordinator was granted People, QR, Reports, Branding, Settings access not in AGENTS.md. Ops was granted Reports access not in AGENTS.md. Read-only was denied Settings visibility contrary to 'all visible' rule.

roles.name: Event Coordinator
roles.description: Events, Program, Registration, Communications, Certificates ONLY
roles.source: AGENTS.md: 'Event Coordinator | org:event_coordinator | Events, Program, Registration, Comms, Certs'

roles.name: Ops
roles.source: AGENTS.md: 'Ops | org:ops | Travel, Accommodation, Transport only'

roles.name: Read-only
roles.description: All modules visible, all write actions disabled
roles.source: AGENTS.md: 'Read-only | org:read_only | All visible, all write actions disabled'

ops.note: Ops CANNOT access Events CRUD. Source: AGENTS.md + Phase 0 amendment + PM decision 2026-04-13.

event_coordinator.note: NEEDS_HUMAN_DECISION: AGENTS.md lists Event Coordinator access as 'Events, Program, Registration, Comms, Certs' — People is NOT listed. Denied until explicitly granted.
NEEDS_HUMAN_DECISION: AGENTS.md does not list QR under Event Coordinator access. Denied until explicitly granted.
NEEDS_HUMAN_DECISION: AGENTS.md does not list Reports under Event Coordinator access. Denied until explicitly granted.

ops.note: NEEDS_HUMAN_DECISION: AGENTS.md says Ops = 'Travel, Accommodation, Transport only'. Reports not listed. Denied until explicitly granted.

event_coordinator.note: NEEDS_HUMAN_DECISION: AGENTS.md does not list Branding under Event Coordinator access. Denied until explicitly granted.
NEEDS_HUMAN_DECISION: AGENTS.md does not list Settings under Event Coordinator access. Denied until explicitly granted.

read_only.note: AGENTS.md says 'All visible, all write actions disabled'. Settings is visible/readable. No higher-priority source denies it.

event_context.description: Active event context is a dashboard shell concern separate from Events CRUD. All authenticated roles may use the active event context so that event-scoped modules can function.

rules.rule: Active event context (knowing which event is selected) is available to all authenticated roles.
rules.note: This does NOT grant Events CRUD (create/edit/delete events).

rules.rule: Ops may use active event context ONLY to reach Travel, Accommodation, and Transport.
rules.note: Ops must not access Events list management, event creation, event editing, or event deletion.

rules.rule: The event workspace shell (M21) may be accessible to Ops with only Travel, Accommodation, Transport module links visible. All Events CRUD links/actions remain hidden for Ops.
rules.note: This is PM decision Option B from 2026-04-13.

rules.rule: Read-only role sees the full event workspace shell with all module navigation links visible, but all write actions are disabled.
rules.note: Per AGENTS.md: 'All visible, all write actions disabled.'

ui_rules.hidden_for_no_access: UI elements for modules a role cannot access MUST be hidden entirely.
ui_rules.disabled_for_read_only: Write buttons MUST be disabled (not hidden) for Read-only role.
ui_rules.read_only_create_forms: For direct create routes, prefer rendering the form in read-only/disabled mode with a clear notice. Server-side mutation attempts MUST be blocked regardless of UI state.
ui_rules.source: AGENTS.md: 'Hide UI elements the role cannot access. Disable (don't hide) write buttons for Read-only.' + PM decision 2026-04-13.
